data.name: Shattered World
data.detailed_description:
Shattered World a 2D action RPG where you get stuck in a world that's fragmented into many pieces, a world full of monsters with no humans in sight. Your sister Sora was taken by a mysterious being, will you be able to save her and find your way back home, or will you fail?

Play as the hero with your sister's fate in your hands. Will you be able to save her only time can tell.
data.about_the_game:
Shattered World a 2D action RPG where you get stuck in a world that's fragmented into many pieces, a world full of monsters with no humans in sight. Your sister Sora was taken by a mysterious being, will you be able to save her and find your way back home, or will you fail?

Play as the hero with your sister's fate in your hands. Will you be able to save her only time can tell.
data.short_description: Stuck in a world that's fragmented in many pieces. Make friends along the way and enemies.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: i3 9400f
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DX11, DX12 capable
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: i5 9400f
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1660
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64bit
  • Processor: i3 9400f
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DX11, DX12 capable
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 500 MB available space

  • OS: Windows 10 64bit
